description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: lint and test, using Python Docker images. In the lint stage add a lint job that runs on python:3, executes pip install -e .[dev], then flake8 --config=.flake8, and finally mypy categories/ tests/test_*, and allow this job to fail without breaking the pipeline. In the test stage add a test_3.4 job that runs on python:3.4, runs pip3 install -e .[dev] and python3 setup.py test. Add test_3.5 and test_3.6 jobs that run on python:3.5 and python:3.6 respectively, each performing pip3 install -e .[dev] followed by python3 setup.py test. Finally, add a test_current job that runs on python:3, prints the Python version with python3 --version, installs the package with pip3 install -e .[dev], and runs python3 setup.py test.
